scripts.build:credit-card: node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b packages/core packages/compiler packages/cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js build --input test/CreditCard.svg --width-tokens test/Width --style-tokens test/Style --out-dir output/CreditCard --config symbol-kit.config.json --name CreditCard
scripts.build:icons: node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -b packages/core packages/compiler packages/cli && node packages/cli/dist/index.js build --input test --width-tokens test/Width --style-tokens test/Style --out-dir output --config symbol-kit.config.json
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.release:check: pnpm check && pnpm --filter @claralight-design/symbol-kit-core pack --dry-run && pnpm --filter @claralight-design/symbol-kit-compiler pack --dry-run
